name: Totem Playground
postCreateCommand:
sudo corepack enable && pnpm install && git checkout --orphan demo && git reset && git add package.json tsconfig.json totem.config.ts src/app/page.tsx src/app/layout.tsx README.md .totem/compiled-rules.json .eslintrc.json && git commit -m baseline --no-verify && git branch -M main && git add src/app/api/ src/lib/ src/middleware/ && (grep -q 'Totem Playground ready' ~/.bashrc || echo "echo -e '
🎯 Totem Playground ready!
Run: pnpm exec totem lint --staged
'" >> ~/.bashrc)
